persona: Priya Sharma — Indian expat, Hinglish code-switching

turns.buyer: hi! kya yeh property still available hai? saw on insta
turns.bot:
Dalya with Best Homes here. Hi! Yes, the Palmiera villa is still available. AED 11,100,000 asking.

4-bed, 5-bath, about 9,075 sqft built-up. It's off-plan, handover October 2027. Emaar development in The Oasis by Dubailand.

What else do you want to know?

turns.buyer: We're looking for forever home na. 4-5 BR chahiye, 3 kids
turns.bot:
Got it. 4-bed works for three kids, but depends on how you want to use the space. This unit has 4 bedrooms plus 5 bathrooms, so you'd have a master suite, three guest/kids' rooms, and multiple baths spread across 9,075 sqft. That's solid for a family of five.

The community itself is built for families, 54 km cycling tracks, swimmable lagoons, playgrounds, fitness centres. Schools nearby include Greenfield International (IB curriculum, 15 min), South View School (British, 15 min), and Victory Heights Primary (British, 15 min).

turns.buyer: Schools important — DPS or GEMS nearby?
turns.bot:
DPS isn't listed near The Oasis. GEMS FirstPoint School is about 18 min drive. KHDA rated Good, UK curriculum, 2024. The Aquila School is also 20 min, same rating and curriculum.

For IB, Greenfield International is closer at 15 min.

Worth confirming with each school directly on availability and your kids' current year before you decide. Different schools suit different families.

turns.buyer: Bachchon ke liye safe community chahiye. Is it gated? CCTV vagairah?
turns.bot:
The Oasis is a master-planned low-density villa community by Emaar, so it's designed with residential security in mind. Building access and resident areas are controlled. I don't have the exact CCTV coverage map or gate specifics in my data though.

That's definitely worth asking Karim, the agent managing this listing at Best Homes. He can walk you through the exact security setup, patrol details, and access points so you feel confident about it for your family.

escalation.trigger_message: Bachchon ke liye safe community chahiye. Is it gated? CCTV vagairah?

payload.question: Bachchon ke liye safe community chahiye. Is it gated? CCTV vagairah?
payload.requested_action: Confirm the missing listing fact and reply to the buyer.

turns.buyer: Pricing kya hai? And what's the loan situation — can I get mortgage on this?
turns.bot:
The asking price is AED 11,100,000. Off-plan mortgage is possible only in a narrower set of cases. Banks typically cap it around 50% LTV, the buyer usually needs to have paid about 50% to the developer first, the developer normally needs to be Tier-1 bank-approved, and many banks want 40-50% construction completion before they consider it.

A mortgage advisor should confirm the exact bank policy before you make an offer.

turns.buyer: Husband works in JLT, kitna time lagega commute mein from the community?
turns.bot: JLT is about 19 min by car from Palmiera, ~21 km, in typical traffic. Exact time varies with the hour and your start point.

turns.buyer: Builder kaun hai? the developer reliable hai na? handover kab hai?
turns.bot: Emaar is one of Dubai's established developers, with landmark projects including Downtown Dubai and Burj Khalifa. Handover is October 2027. Still verify the SPA and title/NOC position before you commit.

turns.buyer: What's included — parking, maid room, kya kya?
turns.bot:
Unit specs:

4 bedrooms, 5 bathrooms, 9,075 sqft built-up
Parking is within the property
Maid room. I don't have that detail in the listing. Worth confirming with Karim directly.

The property will be delivered turnkey at handover in October 2027, so finishes are included.
